overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through a futuristic urban street at golden hour. The player moves along a sidewalk beneath elevated highways, crosses a wide intersection with yellow markings, and continues through a commercial district with neon signs, holographic billboards, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: passing large cylindrical industrial tanks on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking towards camera wearing dark clothing and backpack

entered.detail: blue illuminated sign with 'CYBER' text on the left building facade
massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the street above
large blue and white cylindrical storage tanks on the left sidewalk
floating digital advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic urban environment. The sidewalk is covered but open on the sides, with a blue 'CYBER' neon sign visible on the left. The camera passes large cylindrical industrial tanks and approaches an electronic parts store while sparse pedestrians walk in the opposing direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street approaching major intersection

events.description: exiting the covered area into direct morning sunlight creating long shadows on the pavement
slight rightward curve in the walking path while approaching the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk approaching a wide intersection with increasing sunlight

entered.detail: red illuminated sign reading 'ELECTRONIC PARTS' on the left building
large multi-story building with distinctive zigzag patterned facade on the right

segments.scene_description: Moving from the covered walkway into open sunlight, the scene reveals a futuristic commercial street with long morning shadows. The red 'ELECTRONIC PARTS' sign marks a storefront on the left while a massive zigzag-patterned commercial building dominates the right side. The camera continues forward toward a wide intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: stepping onto the yellow crosswalk and beginning to cross the wide intersection
green sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection along the yellow striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall palm tree visible in the center median of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide sunlit intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. A green sports car passes by on the left as the player continues crossing. The massive zigzag building remains visible on the right while palm trees and additional commercial structures appear in the distance. The space opens up significantly with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and graffiti walls

events.description: finishing crossing the intersection and entering the narrower commercial street on the opposite side
passing by a wall covered in graffiti and scattered newspaper debris on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts and graffiti-covered walls in the commercial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red dress walking ahead on the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
ground-level commercial shops with neon 'OPEN' signs and advertisements
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the scene transitions to a narrower commercial street lined with storefronts on the right. A wall covered in graffiti and scattered newspapers marks the urban environment. The zigzag building now appears in the distance on the left as the camera continues past pedestrians and futuristic vending machines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of an industrial underpass into the bright, expansive light of a futuristic commercial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, passing a blue neon sign and industrial tanks along a covered sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into the golden morning sunlight, shifting from the sheltered walkway to a street dominated by a massive zigzag-patterned building and long shadows. The perspective then expands further as it crosses a wide, sunlit intersection marked with yellow stripes, passing a green sports car while the horizon opens up to reveal palm trees and the sky. Finally, the camera transitions back into a narrower urban corridor, moving past graffiti-covered walls and futuristic vending machines as the large zigzag structure recedes into the distance.
